// src/handler.rs - 3000 lines, handles auth, routing, parsing, db, caching, metrics...

fn authorize_request() {}

fn parse_body() {}
fn validate_input() {}
fn query_database() {}
fn cache_result() {}
fn emit_metrics() {}
fn serialize_response() {}

fn log_request() {}

fn cors_headers() {}
fn compress_response() {}
